message.content:
Test file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_15-33-36_claim-office-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/claim-office.spec.ts
Failing test: "quote with customer at exactly 2 years applies 20% loyalty discount on policy total"
Expected: 2-year customer plain sword = 100 base, policy total = 100 + 10 first insurance - 20 loyalty = 90, +5 fee = 95G
Current error: Expected 95, received 115
Implementation file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_15-33-36_claim-office-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/claim-office.ts

Per spec: policy-wide modifiers (loyalty, first insurance, follow-up) apply to the policy base premium (sum of all item base premiums). They each add/subtract from policy total. Loyalty: yearsWithMHPCO >= 2 -> -20% of items base.

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to Refactor after completion.

content.text: I'll analyze the failing test and implement the minimal code to make it pass.

Now I'll implement the minimal change - apply 20% loyalty discount when yearsWithMHPCO >= 2.

The math: items base = 100, insurance surcharge = 10, loyalty discount = -20 (20% of items base 100), policy total = 100 + 10 - 20 = 90, +5 fee = 95. ✓

content.text:
All 18 tests pass (17 previously + 1 new).

Green Phase Complete:
- **Implementation**: Added loyalty discount logic that subtracts 20% of items base when `customer.yearsWithMHPCO >= 2`
- **Result**: All tests now pass (18 passing, 26 todo)
- **Approach**: Minimal conditional - simple ternary checking the threshold, computing discount as percentage of items base, subtracting from policy total before applying processing fee. Used named constants matching the existing code style.

Math verification: 2-year customer, plain sword (100 base) → 100 + 10 (first insurance) - 20 (loyalty) + 5 (fee) = 95 ✓

Proceeding to Refactor phase.
